---
title: ""
format: html
page-layout: full
toc: false
css: custom2.scss
---
```{=html}
<div class="landing-container" style="gap: 6rem;">

<div class="landing-left">
  <img src="static/img/pic2.jpeg" alt="Julien Migozzi" style="width: 300px; height: 400px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top; border-radius: 2px; filter: grayscale(15%);" />
    <div class="landing-socials">
      <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/jmigozzi.bsky.social" aria-label="Bluesky">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-cloud"></i>
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/jmigozzi" aria-label="GitHub">
        <i class="fab fa-github"></i>
      </a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=TOQMW10AAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate" aria-label="Google Scholar">
        <i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i>
      </a>
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6896-8809" aria-label="ORCID">
        <i class="fab fa-orcid"></i>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="landing-text">
    <p class="landing-tag">Economic Geographer · University of Cambridge</p>
    <h1 class="landing-headline">Digital capitalism,<br><em>cities &amp; inequality</em></h1>
    <p class="landing-bio">
      I am an <a href="https://www.devstudies.cam.ac.uk/staff/dr-julien-migozzi">Assistant Professor</a> in Development Studies in the <a href="https://www.polis.cam.ac.uk/">Department of Politics and International Studies</a>
      at the University of Cambridge.<br>My research explores how digital capitalism reshapes property, finance, and inequalities — with a focus on South Africa.
    </p>
    <div class="landing-buttons">
      <a href="publications.html" class="btn-main">Publications</a>
      <a href="about.html" class="btn-outline">About</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="landing-sections">

  <div class="landing-section">
    <p class="landing-section-label">Appointments</p>
    <div class="landing-position">
      <span class="landing-position-year">2026—</span>
      <span class="landing-position-title">Assistant Professor, University of Cambridge</span>
    </div>
    <div class="landing-position">
      <span class="landing-position-year">2024—25</span>
      <span class="landing-position-title">Visiting Scholar, UC Berkeley</span>
    </div>
    <div class="landing-position">
      <span class="landing-position-year">2022—25</span>
      <span class="landing-position-title">Urban Studies Foundation Postdoctoral Fellow, University of Oxford</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="landing-section">
    <p class="landing-section-label">Recent publications</p>
    <div class="landing-pub">
      <p class="landing-pub-title">Scoring high, paying up, gating in: middle-class formation and asset inequalities under digital capitalism in South Africa</p>
      <p class="landing-pub-venue"><em>International Journal of Urban and Regional Research</em>, 2026</p>
      <p class="landing-pub-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/1468-2427.70004">Journal</a></p>
    </div>
    <div class="landing-pub">
      <p class="landing-pub-title">From the subprime to the premium, from California to fascism?</p>
      <p class="landing-pub-venue"><em>Journal of Cultural Economy</em>, 2026</p>
      <p class="landing-pub-links"><a href="https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/17530350.2025.2523771">Journal</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
